comment: pleme-io/ferrite#check — the Go compile-time memory-safety analyzer. Resolved at IFD via builtins.getFlake against this locked rev (mirrors gen-pin.json). Surface f0 (the -ferrite.poms-dir per-package PoMS emission + passthru.pomsEmit marker) is BUILT on ferrite `feat/poms-emit`; this rev still points at the PRE-f0 ferrite (no flag, no marker), so ferriteFlagAvailable is false and each ferrite node records the typed-JSON pending-poms-emit marker — NOT a real PoMS. The graph wiring + cache-key alignment + the real-emit branch are proven at eval regardless. LiveTODO (see f0_pin_todo): bump `rev` to the merged f0 SHA to flip the realize path on. Tier-honest: pending-marker today, real PoMS only after the bump. (No sha256 field: builtins.getFlake on a bare rev resolves without one; add a locked hash at bump time if the fleet wants it.)
